actions_taken: NO override changes this tick. Rationale: (i) Book continues IMPROVING — daily P&L +1.03% up from +0.87% at 10:30; cumulative +0.60% extending positive territory; trajectory monotone-improving across last 3 snapshots. (ii) ALL 7 pre-armed triggers from 10:30 (A3-G3) DORMANT with measurable buffers; no new firing trigger this tick. (iii) Strategy cadence remains MEASURED (1 NEW BUY in 1h50m vs Day-5 4-BUYs-in-60-min that originally fired the cap stack); ZERO admissions in 10:30→11:00 window for the 4th consecutive 30-min window. (iv) ALL guardrails binding with measurable buffer: deployment 15.03 pp on filled book / 10.26 pp on GLENMARK full-fill; sector caps 9.75+ pp on every cluster; position cap 2.75 pp on largest name (NESTLEIND); SL bands all clean with no holding below SL. (v) The only mildly-narrowing vector is GOLDBEES MTM drift (-1.87% → -1.99%, 12 bps softer) — this is captured by Trigger C4 arming line at -3% (1.01 pp residual). Decoratively tightening on a healthy, positive, recently-de-risked book at 11:00 of Day-7 with all triggers dormant would friction the strategy without addressing any live risk vector — same rationale as 10:00 and 10:30 holds. Current override stack (min_confidence 0.65, max_position_pct 0.15, max_deployed_pct 0.65, default_sl_pct 0.015, min_sl_pct 0.01, max_sl_pct 0.04, daily_loss_limit_pct 0.04, max_sector_pct 0.22) remains correctly calibrated and is NOT relaxed.
